<Ruby={2:4}ねら>狙ってる？

each other again? Wonders never cease.

Next you're going to tell me you're also
chasing after <Color=red>Misko's treasure<Color=white>.

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 48]>嗨。<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 48]>やぁ<unk[5:0]>

<Color=red>Misko's treasure<Color=white>, would you?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:0]>财宝似乎藏在了
<Color=red>塔邦挞边境<Color=white>某处的<Color=red>洞窟<Color=white>里。
<unk[3:0:8]>而且我还听说，
财宝是拉姆达收集的<Color=red>服饰藏品<Color=white>！
比起什么金银珠宝，
这不是浪漫多了～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:0]>據說財寶就藏在
<Color=red>塔邦撻邊境<Color=white>的某個<Color=red>洞窟<Color=white>裡面。
<unk[3:0:8]>而且那個財寶據說是
拉姆達所收集的<Color=red>服裝收藏<Color=white>。
比起金錢和寶石，
這聽起來不是更浪漫嗎～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:0]><Ruby={4:8}ざいほう>財宝は この<Color=red>タバンタ<Ruby={4:10}へんきょう>辺境<Color=white>にある
どこかの<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟<Color=white>に<Ruby={2:4}かく>隠されてるらしいんだ
<unk[3:0:8]>しかも <Ruby={4:8}ざいほう>財宝ってのが

よっぽどロマンがあるよな～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:0]>There's treasure stashed in a <Color=red>cave<Color=white>
somewhere here in the <Color=red>Tabantha Frontier<Color=white>.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:8]>And this isn't any old treasure like money
or jewels. Oh no.<PageBreak>This is something from Misko's personal
<Color=red>clothes collection<Color=white>!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>俗话说“无风不起浪”！

有传闻说，塔邦挞边境的洞窟里
藏着大盗<Color=red>拉姆达<Color=white>的服饰藏品！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>正所謂所謂無風不起浪！

據說在塔邦撻邊境洞窟中，
藏有大盜<Color=red>拉姆達<Color=white>的服裝收藏！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><Ruby={2:2}ひ>火のないところに<Ruby={2:6}けむり>煙はたたない！

タバンタ<Ruby={4:10}へんきょう>辺境の<Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟に<Ruby={2:4}かく>隠された
<Ruby={4:8}とうぞく>盗賊<Color=red>ラムダ<Color=white>の <Ruby={2:4}ふく>服のコレクションのウワサ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]>There's no smoke without fire!<PageBreak>Rumor has it that part of the bandit
<Color=red>Misko<Color=white>'s<Color=red> <Color=white>collection of clothes is hidden
in a cave in the Tabantha Frontier.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:26 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100 95 48 49]>我从<Color=red>山麓驿站<Color=white>的<Color=red>宝物猎人兄弟<Color=white>那里
听说这件事的时候，
也吃了一惊！

去<Color=red>海拉鲁东北方<Color=white>的<Color=red>奥尔汀地区<Color=white>
见见他们两兄弟，绝对不亏！

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:26 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100 95 48 49]>我在<Color=red>山麓驛站<Color=white>
從<Color=red>寶物獵人兄弟<Color=white>口中聽到這消息時，
開心到差點飛上天啦！

特地大老遠跑到<Color=red>海拉魯東北方<Color=white>的<Color=red>奧爾汀地區<Color=white>
找他們兄弟倆，也算是值得了。

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:26 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100 95 48 49]><Ruby={2:6}わたし>私も <Color=red><Ruby={4:8}さんろく>山麓の<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿<Color=white>にいる
<Color=red>トレジャーハンター<Ruby={4:10}きょうだい>兄弟<Color=white>から
この<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話を<Ruby={2:2}き>聞いた<Ruby={2:4}とき>時は <Ruby={2:4}ふる>震えたよ！

<Color=red>ハイラル<Ruby={4:8}ほくとう>北東<Color=white>の <Color=red>オルディン<Ruby={4:6}ちほう>地方<Color=white>まで
<Ruby={4:10}きょうだい>兄弟に<Ruby={2:2}あ>会いに<Ruby={2:2}い>行ったかいが あったってもんだよ

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:26 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100 95 48 49]>That was the most exciting thing I learned
from the <Color=red>treasure-hunting brothers <Color=white>at
<Color=red>Foothill Stable<Color=white>.<PageBreak>It was worth the trip to <Color=red>Eldin <Color=white>in the
<Color=red>northeast of Hyrule <Color=white>to visit them.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>那么，你的目标就是<Color=red>塔邦挞边境<Color=white>咯？<unk[5:1]>
穿过这道山谷就是了。
我也是听说塔邦挞边境某处的<Color=red>洞窟<Color=white>里
藏有<Color=red>拉姆达的财宝<Color=white>，才来寻找的。
<unk[3:0:10]>但是怎么找也找不到……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>那麼，你的目的地是<Color=red>塔邦撻邊境<Color=white>對吧？<unk[5:1]>
那只要穿過這座峽谷就能到囉。
我也因為聽說塔邦撻邊境的某個<Color=red>洞窟<Color=white>
藏有<Color=red>拉姆達的財寶<Color=white>，所以正在尋找呢。
<unk[3:0:10]>不過卻沒有任何進展……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>じゃあ お<Ruby={4:4}めあ>目当ては<Color=red>タバンタ<Ruby={4:10}へんきょう>辺境<Color=white>だろ？<unk[5:1]>
それなら この<Ruby={2:4}たに>谷を<Ruby={2:2}こ>越えたところだよ
<Ruby={2:6}わたし>私も タバンタ<Ruby={4:10}へんきょう>辺境の どこかの<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟<Color=white>に
<Color=red>ラムダの<Ruby={4:8}ざいほう>財宝<Color=white>があると<Ruby={2:2}き>聞いて <Ruby={2:4}さが>探してるんだが
<unk[3:0:10]>なかなか <Ruby={2:2}み>見つからなくてさ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>You're heading for the <Color=red>Tabantha Frontier<Color=white>,
right? <unk[5:1]>It's right beyond this valley.<PageBreak>I heard that <Color=red>Misko's treasure <Color=white>is supposed
to be in a <Color=red>cave <Color=white>somewhere in this area,
so I've gotten to know the region well.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:10]>Haven't found it yet though.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>“既然知道<Color=red>拉姆达的财宝<Color=white>
就藏在<Color=red>塔邦挞边境的洞窟<Color=white>里，
那肯定不费吹灰之力就能找到……”<unk[5:0]>
原本，我是这么以为的。
可没想到会这么难找……

<unk[3:0:10]>我原本還認為只要知道<Color=red>拉姆達的財寶<Color=white>
是藏在<Color=red>塔邦撻邊境的洞窟<Color=white>，
要把財寶找出來
簡直是輕而易舉……<unk[5:0]>
但卻沒想到居然會這麼難找……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:10]><Color=red>ラムダの<Ruby={4:8}ざいほう>財宝<Color=white>が <Color=red>タバンタ<Ruby={4:10}へんきょう>辺境の<Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟<Color=white>に

なんて <Ruby={2:4}おも>思ってたんだけど
こんなにも <Ruby={2:2}み>見つからないものとは…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>I already know that Misko's treasure is<Color=red><Color=white>
hidden in a <Color=red>cave <Color=white>in the <Color=red>Tabantha Frontier<Color=white>.<Color=red><Color=white>
The rest should be a cinch.<unk[5:0]><PageBreak>So why haven't I found it yet?

<unk[3:0:10]>亏我折腾了好久，
先去了<Color=red>奥尔汀地区<Color=white>的<Color=red>山麓驿站<Color=white>，
找<Color=red>宝物猎人兄弟<Color=white>打听以后，

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>虧我還特地跑去
海拉魯東北<Color=red>奧爾汀地區<Color=white>，
向<Color=red>山麓驛站<Color=white>那邊的
<Color=red>寶物獵人兄弟檔<Color=white>打聽消息後才來的……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:10]>せっかくハイラル<Ruby={4:8}ほくとう>北東の <Color=red>オルディン<Ruby={4:6}ちほう>地方<Color=white>にある
<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}さんろく>山麓の<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿<Color=white>まで<Ruby={2:2}い>行って
<Color=red>トレジャーハンターの<Ruby={4:10}きょうだい>兄弟<Color=white>から<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話を<Ruby={2:2}き>聞いて
ここまで<Ruby={2:2}き>来たんだけどね…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>I went all the way to <Color=red>Foothill Stable<Color=white> in
<Color=red>Eldin<Color=white>, in the northeast of Hyrule, just to
talk to the <Color=red>treasure-hunting brothers<Color=white>.<PageBreak>Then I had to walk all the way back here.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我找了好一阵子，还是没找到。

所以下雨的时候我就不勉强自己，
先休息一下，调整好状态，
不然衣服也要淋得湿透了。

<unk[3:0:7]>大盗拉姆达也会把收集来的<Color=red>服饰藏品<Color=white>
藏到<Color=red>洞窟<Color=white>里面，
这么看来，
他一定很有珍爱服饰的意识。
<unk[3:0:8]>没错，就像我一样！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我已經非常努力尋找了，但還是沒有收穫……

所以下雨的時候就別勉強了，
好好休息整頓心情會比較好喔。
況且衣服也會濕透的。

<unk[3:0:7]>既然大盜拉姆達將<Color=red>服裝作為收藏<Color=white>，
還把它們藏在<Color=red>洞窟<Color=white>之中，
他肯定是一個
非常珍惜服裝的人。
<unk[3:0:8]>就像我一樣！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={2:6}わたし>私も かなり<Ruby={2:4}さが>探してるけど <Ruby={2:2}み>見つからなくて…

だから <Ruby={2:4}あめ>雨の<Ruby={2:4}とき>時は<Ruby={4:4}むり>無理せずしっかり<Ruby={2:4}やす>休んで
コンディション<Ruby={2:6}ととの>整えた<Ruby={2:4}ほう>方がいいよ
<Ruby={2:4}ふく>服もビショビショになっちゃうしね

<unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={4:8}とうぞく>盗賊ラムダも <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}ふく>服をコレクション<Color=white>して
<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟<Color=white>に<Ruby={2:4}かく>隠してたところを<Ruby={2:2}み>見ると
きっと<Ruby={2:4}ふく>服を<Ruby={4:6}だいじ>大事にする
<Ruby={4:6}いしき>意識が<Ruby={2:4}たか>高い<Ruby={4:8}じんぶつ>人物だったんだろうな
<unk[3:0:8]>そう <Ruby={2:6}わたし>私みたいにね！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>I've been looking all this time, and still
haven't found it...<PageBreak>But it's raining now. This is the time to
rest up, pull yourself together, and give
your clothes time to dry.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:7]>The bandit Misko probably felt the same
way, given that <Color=red>an outfit from their
collection<Color=white> is stashed away in a <Color=red>cave<Color=white> here.<PageBreak>They clearly had strong feelings about the
proper care and preservation of fabrics.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:8]>Just like me!

<unk[3:0:10]>I've walked up and down the roads in this

<unk[3:0:10]>I asked the treasure hunters at <Color=red>Foothill
Stable <Color=white>which <Color=red>cave<Color=white> to check in the

northeast of Hyrule and back again, and
I'm no closer to my prize.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:10]>If I can't find it now, will I ever?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>不过，这附近的道路我都走遍了，
可是我根本就没找到
看似有<Color=red>拉姆达的财宝<Color=white>的<Color=red>洞窟<Color=white>……

难道一定要远离道路，
深入野外搜寻才行吗……

难得有这么一身好衣服，绝对不能弄脏了……<Size=100><Color=white>

去更遠的地方尋找看看才對……
<Color=grey><Size=80>……不過這樣就難辦了……<unk[5:1]>

もっと<Ruby={2:4}おく>奥に<Ruby={2:2}い>行かないと ダメなのかもね…
<Color=grey><Size=80>…となるとこの<Ruby={2:4}ふく>服では<Ruby={2:4}きび>厳しいかな…<unk[5:1]>

<unk[3:0:10]>I've walked up and down the roads in this
area, and I haven't found any <Color=red>caves <Color=white>at all
that might hold <Color=red>Misko's treasure<Color=white>.<PageBreak>Maybe I need to look further off the
beaten path?<PageBreak><Color=grey><Size=80>That'll be tough in this outfit. <unk[5:1]>Finding Misko's
treasure, or sullying this one-of-a-kind outfit...
Life has presented me with quite the dilemma.<Size=100><Color=white>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>亏我折腾了好久，
先去了<Color=red>奥尔汀地区<Color=white>的<Color=red>山麓驿站<Color=white>，
找到那对宝物猎人兄弟，

打听到大盗<Color=red>拉姆达的财宝<Color=white>
就在塔邦挞边境某处的<Color=red>洞窟<Color=white>里……

没想到有这么难找……
<unk[3:0:10]>难道一定要远离道路，
深入野外搜寻才行吗……
<Color=grey><Size=80>既然叫“边境”，那路肯定不好走……
早知如此，我就穿一身不怕脏的衣服来了……<Size=100><Color=white>
